page_metadata.biotools__summary: NLRscape is an interactive atlas of plant NLRs equipped with a collection of easy, ready to use bioinformatic tools aimed for the exploration of the complex sequence landscape of this class of receptors in plants.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NLRscape is an interactive atlas of plant NLRs equipped with a collection of easy, ready to use bioinformatic tools aimed for the exploration of the complex sequence landscape of this class of receptors in plants.
